analysis_summary.title: Filter EventHandler Analysis
analysis_summary.description: Reverse engineering analysis of Filter-type skill effect handlers in Menace.Tactical.Skills.Effects

fields.name: Condition
fields.description: A tactical condition object that is evaluated with parameters (actor, null, owning_skill). The condition's boolean result determines whether the skill effect is enabled.

behavior.IsEnabled: Evaluates the Condition with the actor and returns the condition result. If actor is null, returns false.
behavior.IsHidden: Returns the inverse of IsEnabled (condition result XOR 1). If actor is null, returns true (hidden).

fields.name: RequiredState
fields.description: The morale state value that the actor must be in for the skill effect to be enabled. Compared against actor's current morale state retrieved via vtable call at offset 0x468.

behavior.IsEnabled: Checks if actor is alive (vtable+0x508), then compares actor's morale state (vtable+0x468) with RequiredState. Returns true if they match.
behavior.IsHidden: Returns true if morale states don't match (inverse of IsEnabled check).

fields.name: RequiredStance
fields.description: The stance value that the actor must be in for the skill effect to be enabled. Compared against actor's current stance stored at actor+0xD0.

behavior.IsEnabled: Checks if actor is alive, then compares actor's current stance (actor+0xD0 / actor[0x1A]) with RequiredStance at effect+0x58. Returns true if they match.
behavior.IsHidden: Returns true if stances don't match.

fields.name: BlockingTags
fields.description: A list of tags that, if found on any of the actor's other skills, will disable this skill effect. Initialized in .ctor using TagType reflection. Uses ContainsAllTags for matching.

behavior.IsEnabled: Calls HasSkillWithTags with BlockingTags. Returns true (enabled) if NO skill has all the blocking tags (result XOR 1).
behavior.IsHidden: Returns HasSkillWithTags result directly - hidden if actor has a skill with all blocking tags.
behavior.HasSkillWithTags: Iterates through actor's skill list (vtable+0x3E8), filters to Skill type only, checks if any skill's tags (skill.Template+0xA8) contain all the specified blocking tags.

key_discoveries.title: Consistent Handler-Effect Pattern
key_discoveries.description: All filter handlers follow the same pattern: the handler stores a reference to the effect data at handler+0x18, and the effect's primary filter field is always at effect+0x58. The Create method instantiates the handler and stores the effect reference.

key_discoveries.title: Common Actor Alive Check
key_discoveries.description: FilterByMorale, FilterByStance, and FilterByOtherSkills all check if the actor is alive before evaluating their conditions using vtable offset 0x508. FilterByCondition delegates this to the condition itself.

key_discoveries.title: IsHidden/IsEnabled Relationship
key_discoveries.description: IsHidden typically returns the inverse of the IsEnabled logic. When a filter condition is not met, the skill effect becomes hidden from the UI.

key_discoveries.title: FilterByCondition is Most Flexible
key_discoveries.description: FilterByCondition uses ITacticalCondition interface, allowing any custom condition logic. It receives (actor, null, owning_skill) as parameters, enabling complex context-aware checks.

key_discoveries.title: FilterByOtherSkills Tag Matching
key_discoveries.description: FilterByOtherSkills uses ContainsAllTags for matching, meaning a skill must have ALL specified tags to trigger the filter. This enables creating skills that are disabled when the actor has certain combinations of other skills.

key_discoveries.title: Stance Stored Directly on Actor
key_discoveries.description: Unlike morale which uses a vtable method call, the actor's current stance is stored directly at offset 0xD0 (array index 0x1A) on the actor object.

key_discoveries.title: BaseEffect Inheritance
key_discoveries.description: All filter effects inherit from BaseEffect which in turn inherits from TileBase (Unity). Fields before 0x58 are inherited from the base classes.

fields.name: OwningSkill
fields.description: Reference to the skill that owns this handler

fields.name: EffectData
fields.description: Reference to the effect data/configuration object

methods.GetActor: 0x1806eef20 - Retrieves the actor from the skill context
